name: Heavy-Duty Field Tractor
description: The Heavy-Duty Field Tractor is engineered for large-scale farming operations. Featuring a powerful 6-cylinder turbocharged diesel engine, this tractor delivers exceptional torque and fuel efficiency across demanding terrain. Its enclosed climate-controlled cab ensures operator comfort during long working hours, while the advanced hydraulic system provides precise control for a wide range of implements.
features: Power take-off (PTO) with multiple speed settings

name: Compact Orchard Tractor
description: Purpose-built for orchards, vineyards, and confined spaces, the Compact Orchard Tractor combines manoeuvrability with reliable power. Its narrow profile and tight turning radius allow effortless navigation between crop rows. The open-station ROPS design provides excellent visibility, while the robust 3-cylinder engine handles mowing, spraying, and light tillage tasks with ease.
features: Tight turning radius for row-crop work

name: Front Loader Utility Tractor
description: A versatile workhorse for mixed farming operations, this utility tractor comes equipped with an integrated front loader for material handling, loading, and earthmoving. The turbocharged 4-cylinder engine provides ample power, and the quick-attach loader system allows rapid switching between buckets and forks for maximum productivity on the farm.

name: 8-Disc Heavy Plough
description: The 8-Disc Heavy Plough is designed for primary tillage in tough soil conditions. Its reinforced steel frame and high-carbon disc blades cut through compacted and rocky soil with minimal resistance. Adjustable disc angles allow precise depth and width control, making it suitable for both virgin land breaking and seasonal ploughing operations.

name: 3-Furrow Mouldboard Plough
description: A classic mouldboard design perfected for Southern African soil conditions. This 3-furrow plough inverts and aerates soil effectively, burying crop residue and weeds to prepare a clean seedbed. The hydraulic depth control and auto-reset protection system ensure consistent performance even in stony fields, reducing downtime and maintenance costs.

name: Deep Tillage Chisel Plough
description: Break through hardpan layers and improve water infiltration with the Deep Tillage Chisel Plough. Equipped with heavy-duty tines and a rear crumbler roller, this implement shatters compacted subsoil without inverting the topsoil, preserving organic matter and reducing erosion. Ideal for conservation tillage and soil rehabilitation programmes.

name: Center Pivot Sprinkler System
description: Our Center Pivot Sprinkler System provides uniform water distribution across large circular fields. The galvanised steel structure is built to withstand harsh weather conditions, while the low-pressure spray nozzles minimise water loss through evaporation. GPS-guided alignment and variable rate application zones ensure every hectare receives precisely the right amount of water.
features: Remote monitoring and control via app

name: Impact Sprinkler Head
description: The Impact Sprinkler Head is a reliable, field-proven component for solid-set and portable irrigation systems. Its brass and polymer construction resists corrosion and UV degradation, ensuring years of trouble-free service. The adjustable arc and flow rate allow precise water application for crops ranging from pasture grass to tall maize.
features: Brass nozzle with stainless steel spring

name: Travelling Rain Gun
description: The Travelling Rain Gun delivers high-volume irrigation over long strips of farmland, making it ideal for hay fields, sugarcane, and pasture. Mounted on a robust wheeled cart, it retracts along a guide cable while spraying, covering up to 5 hectares per pull. The adjustable trajectory and nozzle size allow operators to match application rates to soil infiltration capacity.
features: Wheeled cart with cable retraction system

name: Complete Drip Irrigation Kit
description: Everything you need to set up efficient drip irrigation for small to medium plots. This kit includes 100 m of UV-stabilised drip line, pressure-compensating emitters, connectors, filters, and stakes. Drip irrigation delivers water directly to the root zone, reducing water usage by up to 60% compared to overhead sprinklers while promoting vigorous, uniform crop growth.

name: Pressure Regulator & Filter Unit
description: Protect your drip irrigation system with this combined pressure regulator and filter unit. The adjustable pressure regulator ensures consistent downstream pressure regardless of supply fluctuations, while the 120-mesh disc filter removes sand and organic particles that could block emitters. Quick-release housing makes cleaning and maintenance fast and simple.

name: Micro-Sprinkler Starter Kit
description: Ideal for greenhouses, nurseries, and under-tree irrigation, the Micro-Sprinkler Starter Kit provides gentle, uniform water distribution over a small radius. Each micro-sprinkler sits on a sturdy ground stake and connects to 4 mm micro-tubing. The kit covers up to 200 m² and includes all fittings, tubing, and a header line manifold.

name: Industrial Centrifugal Pump
description: Designed for continuous high-flow water transfer from dams and reservoirs, the Industrial Centrifugal Pump features a cast-iron volute casing and stainless steel impeller for maximum durability. The close-coupled electric motor eliminates alignment issues, while the mechanical seal ensures leak-free operation under sustained pressure. Suitable for main-line irrigation supply and water distribution networks.

name: Stainless Submersible Pump
description: The Stainless Submersible Pump is built for reliable, long-term operation submerged in dam water. Its full stainless steel construction resists corrosion from minerals and sediment, while the built-in thermal overload and dry-run protection prevent motor damage. Ideal for dam-to-reservoir or dam-to-pivot irrigation supply where suction lift is impractical.

name: Portable Diesel Water Pump
description: When you need water where there's no electricity, the Portable Diesel Water Pump delivers. This self-priming trash pump handles dirty water, sludge, and solids up to 30 mm diameter. The air-cooled diesel engine starts easily with a recoil or electric starter, and the steel roll-cage frame with pneumatic wheels makes it simple to tow between dam sites.

name: HDPE Dam Liner (500 micron)
description: Our premium HDPE Dam Liner provides a completely waterproof barrier for earth dams and reservoirs. The 500-micron high-density polyethylene membrane resists UV degradation, root penetration, and chemical attack. Factory-welded seams ensure leak-proof joins, and the flexible material conforms to irregular dam profiles without cracking or tearing.

name: Dam Shade Net Cover
description: Reduce evaporation from your farm dam by up to 85% with our floating shade net cover. The knitted HDPE netting blocks direct sunlight while allowing rainwater to pass through. Modular panels clip together to cover any dam shape, and built-in flotation elements keep the cover on the water surface without anchoring infrastructure.

name: Geotextile Dam Wall Fabric
description: Reinforce your dam walls and protect liners with this non-woven geotextile fabric. Placed beneath the HDPE liner, it cushions against sharp stones and provides additional puncture resistance. It also functions as a separation layer between fill material and the dam wall, preventing fine soil migration while allowing water to drain freely.
